---
title: "CrossedLMEResult"
generated: true
description: "Crossed two-factor mixed-model fit output (the [`lme_fit`](../nitrix-stats-lme-reml/lme_fit.qmd) R4 path)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme.reml`](../nitrix-stats-lme-reml.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:CrossedLMEResult -->
```python
class CrossedLMEResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:CrossedLMEResult -->
Crossed two-factor mixed-model fit output (the [`lme_fit`](../nitrix-stats-lme-reml/lme_fit.qmd) R4 path).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:CrossedLMEResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(beta_hat: Float[Array, 'V p'], var_group: Float[Array, 'V'], var_cross: Float[Array, 'V'], sigma_e_sq: Float[Array, 'V'], log_lik: Float[Array, 'V'], tier: str) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:CrossedLMEResult -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
